name: RPX-series Competition ESC
description: Yokomo RPX competition/drift ESCs. No Windows PC app - configured with the BL-R26P program card or the Wi-Fi programmer module app.
notes: Hardware-only device: no downloadable PC configuration software. Firmware ships as a .bin copied to a FAT32 microSD and loaded by the BL-R26P programmer - the PC is only a card reader. The current generation is the BL-RPX4, which has factory Drift Spec variants (DB/DR/DP); the older BL-RPX3 product page is now a soft-404 (HTTP 200 serving a 'product not found' body), so homepage points at the surviving RPX3 V2 page.
